  FreeBSD ports repository

  Log:
  The shape extension wraps libshape and provides the ability to write programs
  for manipulating ESRI shapefiles.
  
  WWW: http://pecl.php.net/package/shape/
  
  - Ditesh Shashikant Gathani
  ditesh@gathani.org
